title: Production go-live readiness for the EI assessment app (frontend-only)

requirements.summary: Harden frontend production configuration for Internet Identity + backend canister connectivity, and document go-live deployment steps for the full app.
acceptanceCriteria: A documented set of deployment steps exists (commands and order of operations) to deploy the backend and frontend canisters to a production network target (e.g., IC mainnet).
The deployed app loads successfully in a browser from the production frontend canister URL and can reach the backend canister without CORS/agent errors.
Internet Identity authentication works in production: user can log in, log out, and remain authenticated across refreshes.
A user can complete the 50-item assessment in production, submit it, and then view their computed results (five competency totals + categories).
A surveyor (allowlisted principal) can access the Surveyor Dashboard in production and export submissions to CSV and JSON.
An admin can add/remove surveyor principals in production and the permission change takes effect without redeploying.

file_operations.description: Make Internet Identity configuration production-safe by sourcing the identityProvider from Vite-compatible runtime env (e.g., import.meta.env) with a sensible production default, and ensure derivationOrigin behavior remains correct for production persistence across refreshes. Use the selected "authorization" component guidance for Internet Identity behavior (login/logout, persisted identity) and role-based access control expectations. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Improve production robustness of actor initialization to avoid breaking authenticated sessions due to missing/invalid URL secret parameters (e.g., make access-control secret initialization best-effort and non-fatal), and ensure the actor is recreated cleanly on identity changes to prevent agent/config mismatches in production. Use the selected "authorization" component guidance for clearing cached data on logout and guarding authenticated data access. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add a production deployment runbook documenting commands and order of operations to build frontend assets and deploy backend + frontend canisters to a production network target, including where to record canister IDs and the production frontend URL, and any required environment configuration values for Internet Identity in production.

requirements.summary: Provide a production readiness checklist and a <10-minute smoke-test flow runnable immediately after deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Checklist includes at minimum: canister IDs recorded, frontend URL recorded, Internet Identity login verified, assessment submission verified, results view verified, surveyor export verified, and admin surveyor management verified.
Smoke-test flow can be executed by a developer or operator in under 10 minutes using only the deployed app UI and documented commands (if any).

file_operations.description: Create a concise production readiness checklist covering: canister IDs recorded, frontend URL recorded, Internet Identity login verified, assessment submission verified, results view verified, surveyor export verified (CSV + JSON), and admin surveyor management verified (add/remove takes effect without redeploy).

Create a step-by-step smoke-test flow that can be completed in under 10 minutes using the deployed UI (plus any necessary documented commands), including: login/logout + refresh persistence, completing/submitting the 50-item assessment, verifying results, verifying surveyor dashboard access + exports, and verifying admin add/remove surveyor principals.
